chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1138 of 2024 CP D 1139 of 2024 CP D 1140 of 2024 CP D 1141 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.5409/2024. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Fahim Khanzada, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Iqbal Hussain, advocate for the respondents. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Notices have been impugned in each of four petitions. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that the petitioners have already submitted reply to the notices and shall be satisfied if the same are decided by the department after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners vide speaking order. Learned counsel further states that it may be just and proper for the department to not take any coercive action against the petitioners, pending adjudication as aforesaid. Learned counsel for the respondents states that he has no objection, if these petitions are disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
